{{Infobox character
| name = Nightwyrm (The Elder Empire: Shadow)
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Shadow and Sea (novel)|Of Shadow and Sea]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Nightwyrm is a powerful entity associated with the [[Kameira]]. It possesses exceptional physical constitution and is described as being soulbound to the awakened tail of a Stormwing, making it an extremely hazardous creature that requires extreme caution when approached. The Nightwyrm is one of several [[Kameira]] powers contained within a single individual, and it has been known to exhibit violent behavior, such as raging and rampaging. During these episodes, the host may experience physical spasms as their own flesh attempts to act independently of their will.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Alchemists]] have long claimed to be able to offer the constitution of a Nightwyrm, which is identified as a type of [[Kameira]]. As an entity residing inside [[Meia]], the creature demands that she face her challenges head-on. However, it also causes physical spasms beneath her skin and urges her to retreat from conflict.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Alchemists]] claim to offer the constitution of a Nightwyrm.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Nightwyrm demands that [[Meia]] meet challenges head-on.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c15">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Nightwyrm causes spasms under [[Meia]]'s skin.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c19">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Nightwyrm is an entity inside [[Meia]] that urges her to retreat.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c23">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Nightwyrm is a type of [[Kameira]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“We have solutions that will give you the power of a Hydra, the constitution of a Nightwyrm, the fortitude of a Deepstrider...all the natural advantages that the Kameira have over man, they will be yours!<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
